package.inclusions_text: L1: Standard inclusions - Doctor's fee, OT charges, Anasthetic Charges, Drugs, Investigations, Professional charges, Room rents, Nursing & administrative charges | L3: Special Investigations - Assays, high end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans,etc. | L4: Modalities of treatment - Laproscopy/abdominal/vaginal/etc.
package.exclusions_text: L2: Implants - IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers
package.inclusions_text_clean:
- Doctor's Fee
- OT Charges
- Anaesthetic Charges
- Medications
- Investigations
- Professional Charges
- Room Rent
- Nursing & Administrative Charges
- Special Investigations: Assays, high-end hormonal studies, SPECT, A-scans, etc.
- Modalities of Treatment: Laparoscopy, abdominal, vaginal, etc.
package.exclusions_text_clean: - Implants (such as IOL, pacemakers, orthopedic prostheses, stents, staplers)

Package conversion check: the converted total ₹2,03,680 is outside the actual billed range ₹2,83,226–₹4,42,513 (51 cases) — check this package's inclusion/exclusion parsing and price before quoting.

lines.note: 5% GST on the full room rent (₹8500/day > ₹5,000).
ICU/CCU/ICCU/NICU/HDU room rent is GST-exempt even above ₹5,000.

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
